source_docs.title: Integrative single-cell analysis of transcriptional and epigenetic states in the human adult brain
Integrative single-cell analysis of transcriptional and epigenetic states in the human adult brain

oligos.name: Barcoded r5 transposon (74-bp)
oligos.role: Barcoded transposon (transferred/top strand) loaded into Tn5059; carries the round-1 combinatorial cell barcode (r5)

components.name: T7 promoter
components.role: T7 RNA-pol promoter for in vitro transcription (linear amplification); standard T7 promoter sequence (exact transcribed sequence not printed in provided documents)

components.name: i5 connector
components.role: i5 connector sequence used in PCR amplification (linker read through during i5 index read); sequence in Supplementary Table 12, not extractable

components.name: r5 barcode
components.role: 6-bp round-1 cell barcode, unique to each of 384 transposons, minimum edit distance 2 (Supplementary Table 12)

components.name: Read1 primer site
components.role: Read 1 sequencing-primer binding site; sequence in Supplementary Table 12, not extractable

components.name: Mosaic end (ME)
components.role: 19-bp Tn5 mosaic end for transposase binding; canonical Tn5 ME (not literally printed in provided documents)

oligos.notes: Two-oligo transposon: this 74-bp barcoded strand is annealed to the 19-bp 5'-phosphorylated RC mosaic end, then loaded onto Tn5059. 384 uniquely barcoded r5 transposons total.

oligos.name: Universal 5'-phosphorylated (RC) mosaic end (19-bp)
oligos.role: Non-transferred strand of the Tn5 transposome; anneals to the ME of every barcoded transposon
oligos.notes: Described as the 19-bp universal 5' phosphorylated mosaic end ('RC mosaic end'). Sequence shown is the canonical reverse-complement Tn5 mosaic end (5'-phosphate); exact characters not printed in the provided documents.

oligos.name: Custom nXTv2_i7 transposon
oligos.role: Transposon annealed and loaded onto Tn5059 to make the custom nXTv2_i7 transposome used for simultaneous fragmentation + 3' i7-adaptor addition on double-stranded cDNA

components.name: nXTv2_i7 adaptor
components.role: i7-side Nextera XT v2 adaptor arm; sequence in Supplementary Table 12, not extractable

components.name: Mosaic end (ME)
components.role: Tn5 mosaic end (canonical); annealed to the 5'-phosphorylated RC mosaic end

oligos.notes: Complexed at 7 uM Tn5059 with 10 uM annealed transposon, diluted to 0.7 uM; used at 0.14 uM final for 3' tagmentation.

oligos.name: Random hexamers (N6)
oligos.role: Reverse-transcription primers on the IVT RNA (SMART MMLV RT)
oligos.notes: Used at 20 uM; 2.5 uL per reaction.

oligos.name: sss_scnXTv2 second-strand primer
oligos.role: Second-strand synthesis primer added after RNase H digestion (extended with NEB Taq)
oligos.notes: 20 uM stock, 2.5 uL per reaction (Supplementary Table 12); exact sequence not extractable.

oligos.name: scT7_S5XX i5 index primer
oligos.role: Custom scTHS-seq i5 index PCR primer (P5 side); adds i5 sample index and P5

components.name: P5
components.role: Illumina P5 flow-cell adaptor (canonical; not literally printed in documents)

components.name: i5 index
components.role: Custom scTHS-seq i5 sample index (round-2 barcode, 8-well set)

oligos.notes: Used with KAPA SYBR Fast in an 8 x 12 (i5 x i7) qPCR barcoding format; exact index sequences in Supplementary Table 12.

oligos.name: nXTv2_i7XX i7 index primer
oligos.role: Standard Illumina Nextera XT v2 i7 index PCR primer (P7 side); adds i7 sample index and P7

components.name: i7 index
components.role: Standard Illumina i7 sample index (round-2 barcode, 12-well set)

components.name: P7
components.role: Illumina P7 flow-cell adaptor (canonical; not literally printed in documents)

oligos.notes: Standard Illumina i7 indexes; 8 x 12 (i5 x i7) format, 9-12 qPCR cycles.

final_library.annotated_library_sequence: P5 - i5 index - i5 connector/linker - r5 barcode - Read1 primer - genomic insert - ME - nXTv2_i7 adaptor - i7 index - P7
annotation_lines: [SPACER:N]                    : i5 connector / linker (read through during i5 index read)
[CDNA]                        : captured genomic DNA (accessible-chromatin fragment; ~50 bp read)
CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT           : Tn5 mosaic end (from nXTv2_i7 tagmentation)

library_generation.title: Nuclei isolation & tagmentation buffer
library_generation.summary: Mixed human+mouse nuclei are lysed and resuspended in tagmentation buffer for combinatorial indexing.
library_generation.note: Human and mouse nuclei (for collision-rate QC) are mixed at ~2.4x10^5 nuclei/mL in 1.5x tagmentation buffer (33 mM TrisOAc pH7.8, 66 mM K-OAc, 10 mM Mg-OAc, 16% DMF).

library_generation.title: Barcoded r5 tagmentation (round-1 index)
library_generation.summary: ~2,000 nuclei per well are tagmented in a 384-well plate of uniquely barcoded r5 Tn5059 transposomes, inserting a T7-promoter/r5-barcode transposon into accessible DNA.
library_generation.note: Tn5059 super-mutant complexed with 384 unique r5 barcodes; 0.7 uM final, 37 C 30 min; stopped with 50 mM EDTA.
library_generation.product:
5'- T7prom-[i5conn]-[r5 BC:6]-[Read1]-AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG          genomic DNA          -3'
                                        <--Tn5-->
3'-                          genomic DNA          CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT-[Read1]-[r5 BC:6]-[i5conn]-T7prom -5'

library_generation.title: Pool + FACS redistribution (round-2 setup)
library_generation.summary: Tagmented, inactivated nuclei are pooled and FACS-sorted (100 nuclei/well) into 96-well plates.
library_generation.note: Propidium-iodide sort; doublets removed by FSC/SSC. Establishes the second split for combinatorial indexing.

library_generation.title: End fill-in
library_generation.summary: NEB Taq fills in the 9-bp tagmentation gap to make the transposon-borne T7 promoter double-stranded.

library_generation.title: In vitro transcription (linear amplification)
library_generation.summary: T7 RNA polymerase transcribes from the double-stranded T7 promoter, linearly amplifying each tagmented fragment into RNA.
library_generation.note: NEB HiScribe T7, 37 C 19 h. Confers high sensitivity (THS-seq principle).

library_generation.title: Reverse transcription
library_generation.summary: Random hexamers prime SMART MMLV RT to copy the IVT RNA back into cDNA.
library_generation.note: 22 C 10 min, 42 C 60 min, 70 C 10 min; then Enzymatics RNase H degrades RNA in the hybrid.

library_generation.title: Second-strand synthesis
library_generation.summary: The sss_scnXTv2 primer anneals and NEB Taq extends to regenerate double-stranded cDNA.
library_generation.note: 65 C 2 min anneal; 72 C 8 min extension.
library_generation.product:
5'- [i5conn]-[r5 BC:6]-[Read1]- genomic insert -3'
3'- [i5conn]-[r5 BC:6]-[Read1]- genomic insert -5'

library_generation.title: 3' adaptor tagmentation (i7 side)
library_generation.summary: A custom nXTv2_i7 Tn5059 transposome fragments the dsDNA and adds the i7-side adaptor.
library_generation.note: 0.14 uM transposome, 55 C 6 min; stopped with 4 M guanidine-HCl.

library_generation.title: PCR indexing (round-2 i5 x i7)
library_generation.summary: qPCR with scT7_S5XX (i5) and nXTv2_i7XX (i7) primers adds sample indexes and P5/P7 in an 8x12 format.
library_generation.note: KAPA SYBR Fast; 95 C 10 s / 63 C 30 s / 72 C 1 min, 9-12 cycles to saturation.

library_generation.title: Pool & size-select
library_generation.summary: Uniquely indexed qPCR products are pooled, size-selected, quantified, and sequenced.
library_generation.note: Validated on 6% TBE/SYBR Gold gels; SPRI size selection.

library_sequencing.note: 50-bp read of captured genomic (accessible-chromatin) DNA, primed from the r5-transposon Read1 site and extending into the insert toward the nXTv2_i7 mosaic end.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Read 1 sequencing primer
                          ------------------------------------->
5'- [r5 bc (6)][Read1 primer site]|==== genomic DNA insert (50 nt) ====|CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT[i7 adaptor]... -3'
3'- [r5 bc (6)][Read1 primer site]|==== genomic DNA insert (50 nt) ====|GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGA[i7 adaptor]... -5'
                                  |<-------------- Read 1: 50 bp -------------->|

library_sequencing.primer: Standard Illumina Nextera i7 index primer
library_sequencing.note: 8-cycle standard Illumina i7 sample index read (round-2 barcode); primer anneals to the P7-proximal nXTv2_i7 adaptor and reads the i7 index.
library_sequencing.diagram:
5'- CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT[i7 adaptor][i7 index (8)]ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG -3'
3'- GACAGAGAATATGTGTAGA[i7 adaptor][i7 index (8)]TAGAGCATACGGCAGAAGACGAAC -5'
                                 <----------------------------------------
                                 i7 index primer  (Index 1: 8 cycles)

library_sequencing.note: 32-cycle read that captures the i5 index (round-2 barcode), then reads through the i5 connector/linker and ends in the r5 transposon barcode (round-1 barcode) — 'the i5 and r5 barcodes are read in one sequencing read'. MiSeq validation ran 50+32+32; HiSeq 2500 data generation ran 50+8+32.
library_sequencing.diagram:
i5 index primer (scT7_S5XX)
    ------------------------------------------------------->
5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[i5 index (8)][i5 linker][r5 bc (6)][Read1 primer site]... -3'
3'- TTACTATGCCGCTGGTGGCTCTAGATGTG[i5 index (8)][i5 linker][r5 bc (6)][Read1 primer site]... -5'
                                 |<---- Index 2 read: 32 cycles (i5 + linker + r5 barcode) ---->|

title: scTHS-seq
description: scTHS-seq (single-cell transposome hypersensitive-site sequencing) is a droplet-free, combinatorial-indexing single-nucleus DNA-accessibility assay. Nuclei are distributed into a 384-well plate of uniquely barcoded (r5) Tn5059 super-mutant transposome complexes that tagment open chromatin, inserting a barcoded transposon bearing a T7 promoter; after pooling and FACS redistribution, in vitro transcription linearly amplifies tagmented fragments, which are reverse-transcribed, made double-stranded, tagmented again with a custom i7 transposome, and PCR-indexed (i5 × i7). Sequencing reads capture ~50 bp of genomic DNA (Read 1) plus the combinatorial cell identity (r5 transposon barcode + i5 index + i7 index), mapping accessible chromatin at single-cell resolution across archived human brain tissue.

reference.label: Integrative single-cell analysis of transcriptional and epigenetic states in the human adult brain

original_publication.title: Integrative single-cell analysis of transcriptional and epigenetic states in the human adult brain

throughput.summary: scTHS-seq generated 32,869 single-cell chromatin-accessibility datasets from 3 individuals/3 experiments; ~25,000 single-cell datasets are optimally recovered per run.
throughput.cells: 32,869 single nuclei profiled (27,906 resolved into cell types; 15,786 combined across regions); ~2,000 nuclei per 384-well well; median 10,168 unique accessible-region reads per cell; 287,381 accessibility peaks over 144 Mb; 52,694 sites used for clustering.
throughput.rna: In vitro transcription (T7) provides linear amplification of tagmented fragments (RNA intermediate); no transcriptome measured by scTHS-seq itself.
throughput.dna: Single-cell open-chromatin (DNA-accessibility) maps; paired snDrop-seq gave >60,000 combined single cells across both assays.

publication.statistical_model: Censored (right-censored) Poisson process modeling the probability of observing a read at each genomic site per cell (saturating after a few reads); overdispersion scored with a variance-gamma distribution. (snDrop-seq expression modeled with negative binomial / Poisson-family; scTHS-seq/snDrop-seq integration via gradient-boosted regression models.)

other.label: Transposase
other.value: Tn5059 engineered super-mutant Tn5 (from Illumina; Kia et al. 2017), enabling higher sensitivity than ATAC-seq

other.label: Amplification
other.value: Linear amplification by in vitro transcription (T7), inherited from the THS-seq assay (Sos et al. 2016)

other.label: Sequencing platforms
other.value: Illumina MiSeq (50+32+32 single-end, validation) and HiSeq 2500 (50+8+32 single-end, data generation)

other.label: Species-mixing collision QC
other.value: hg38 (no-alt +decoy) vs mm10; a barcode combination assigned to one species if >=89% reads map to one genome

other.label: Sequence caveat
other.value: Exact r5 barcode, i5 connector, Read1-primer, sss_scnXTv2, scT7_S5XX and nXTv2_i7 sequences are in Supplementary Table 12, which could not be extracted from the provided files; canonical Tn5 mosaic end, T7 promoter, and Illumina P5/P7 shown are standard constants, not verbatim from the documents.

data_processing.summary: Raw reads are demultiplexed by combinatorial cell barcode, mapped to hg38 (no-alt + decoy) and mm10 with BWA, deduplicated, and filtered per barcode; pooled BAMs feed joint peak calling, and the resulting binary peaks-by-cells matrix is clustered under a censored-Poisson accessibility model and visualized by t-SNE.
data_processing.statistical_model: Censored (right-censored) Poisson process per genomic site; overdispersion scored with a variance-gamma distribution.
